message:
fix(protocol): add length-prefixing to HolderProof signable bytes

Change HolderProof::signable_bytes() from bare concatenation to
length-prefixed encoding:

  Before: "FCP2-HOLDER-PROOF-V1" || request_id || operation_id || token_jti
  After:  "FCP2-HOLDER-PROOF-V1" || len(request_id) || request_id ||
          len(operation_id) || operation_id || len(token_jti) || token_jti

Length fields are u32 little-endian. This prevents ambiguous parsing
when field boundaries are not known — e.g., request_id="ab" + op="cd"
would otherwise produce the same signable bytes as request_id="abc" +
op="d". The length prefix makes each field boundary unambiguous.

Also update test assertion string from "Full access granted" to
"Healthy" for ResourceAvailability test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
